title: NEW Claude Opus 4.6 AI Good For TradingView Strategies? (Backtesting Engine) (watch ASAP)
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: That's right guys Claude released Opus 4.6 and I've tested it for trading strategies.
And it's an absolute game changer guys because I was able to create the backtesting engine with this AI which has the same exact backtesting results as TradingView has.

And that matters because when the AI figures out the trading strategy for you then it can finally run a backtest to figure out that some of the ideas that it has are not so good and give you the best one.
And when you then use that in TradingView you will get the exact same numbers.
Gone other times when the AI proposes you a new trading strategy you copy the code into TradingView just to be disappointed.
It is definitely a game changer because now the AI can run simulations that actually matter and it can make decisions based on these numbers while you're drinking your coffee.
I hope you realize how big this is guys and I'm excited to show you to you right now let's get started.
And guys make sure to like this video if it adds value to you because otherwise the YouTube algorithm will never know and also you're supporting this channel.
Also remember this is not financial advice crypto is risky you can lose all of your money guys and that is why I run this educational channel so that you are always ahead of the herd.

First of all let me show you how all of this works before I show you how to set this up and what I'm using here but roughly speaking I'm using Claude application on the desktop I'm using Claude code on the desktop it's very simple because it's just a chat for you guys and I'm giving it a folder to work in and also I'm choosing Opus 4.6 obvious I will show you later but the magic happens when this AI is able to run its own back test and its own variations of strategies.
